text: Here's what science actually says about the complement system. The complement system is a crucial part of your immune defense, activating in response to pathogens. But did you know it also helps clear dead cells and boosts the effectiveness of antibodies? Research shows that dysfunction in this system can lead to autoimmune disorders. Understanding it could unlock new treatments for diseases like lupus or rheumatoid arthritis. Want to dive deeper into the wonders of your immune system? Hit that follow button!
